name: apodictic
description: APODICTIC: anotherpanacea's Development Editor. Developmental editing that listens before diagnosing. Provides structural diagnosis, genre calibration, tag audits, plot architecture analysis, revision coaching, pre-writing pathway, and intake routing across 11 core passes, 23 specialized audits, 5 tag audits, 4 research modes, 1 pre-writing pathway, and 1 intake router. Includes contract-driven and finding-driven audit integration pipeline.
